services.name: PolicySurrenderService
services.description: Orchestrates the overall policy surrender workflow and state transitions.

services.name: SurrenderValueCalculationService
services.description: Calculates guaranteed and special surrender values based on policy duration.

services.name: SurrenderPenaltyService
services.description: Determines penalties and deduction charges for early policy surrender.

services.name: PartialSurrenderService
services.description: Handles rules and limits for partial withdrawals and surrenders.

services.name: SurrenderDisbursementService
services.description: Manages the final disbursement process specific to surrendered policies.

services.name: AnnuityCalculationService
services.description: Calculates periodic annuity payout amounts based on accumulated corpus.

services.name: AnnuityPayoutScheduleService
services.description: Generates and maintains the monthly, quarterly, or annual payout schedules.

services.name: DeferredAnnuityService
services.description: Manages accumulation phases and vesting dates for deferred annuity plans.

services.name: PensionCommutationService
services.description: Calculates lump sum withdrawal limits from pension policies upon maturity.

services.name: AnnuityLifeCertificateService
services.description: Tracks and validates annual life certificates required for continuous annuity payouts.

services.name: JointLifeAnnuityService
services.description: Calculates survivor benefits and secondary annuitant payout transitions.

services.name: TdsCalculationService
services.description: Computes Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) for maturity and surrender payouts.

services.name: CapitalGainsTaxService
services.description: Calculates short-term and long-term capital gains on ULIP maturities.

services.name: TaxExemptionEvaluationService
services.description: Evaluates policies against section 10(10D) and other tax exemption rules.

services.name: FatcaComplianceService
services.description: Ensures FATCA/CRS declaration compliance before high-value disbursements.

services.name: TaxReportingService
services.description: Generates tax data extracts for regulatory authority submissions.

services.name: UlipNavCalculationService
services.description: Retrieves and applies the correct Net Asset Value for maturity dates.

services.name: UnitCancellationService
services.description: Processes the cancellation of units across multiple funds at maturity.

services.name: FundSwitchingService
services.description: Handles automatic fund switches to debt/liquid funds as maturity approaches.

services.name: UlipMaturityService
services.description: Consolidates fund values and mortality charge refunds for final ULIP payouts.

services.name: MortalityChargeRefundService
services.description: Calculates refunds of mortality charges for applicable ULIP products.

services.name: OutstandingLoanRecoveryService
services.description: Identifies active policy loans to be recovered from maturity proceeds.

services.name: LoanInterestCalculationService
services.description: Calculates accrued interest on policy loans up to the maturity date.

services.name: MaturityLoanAdjustmentService
services.description: Performs the net calculation of maturity value minus loan and interest.

services.name: PolicyPledgeService
services.description: Verifies and clears assignments or pledges against the policy before payout.

services.name: LoanDischargeService
services.description: Generates loan closure documentation upon successful recovery from maturity.

services.name: TerminalBonusService
services.description: Calculates terminal or final additional bonuses declared at maturity.

services.name: LoyaltyAdditionService
services.description: Computes loyalty additions for policies completing their full premium term.

services.name: GuaranteedAdditionService
services.description: Calculates contractually guaranteed additions accrued over the policy term.

services.name: VestedBonusService
services.description: Aggregates all simple or compound reversionary bonuses vested over the years.

services.name: ReversionaryBonusService
services.description: Applies annual bonus rates to sum assured for participating policies.

services.name: LegalHeirValidationService
services.description: Validates legal heir documentation when no nominee is present.

services.name: MinorNomineeTrusteeService
services.description: Manages appointee details and payouts when the nominee is a minor.

services.name: BeneficiaryShareAllocationService
services.description: Calculates split payouts for multiple beneficiaries based on percentage shares.

services.name: SuccessionCertificateService
services.description: Verifies succession certificates for high-value un-nominated claims.

services.name: DisputeResolutionService
services.description: Places maturity payouts on hold in case of legal disputes or rival claims.

services.name: NriRepatriationService
services.description: Evaluates repatriation limits and rules for Non-Resident Indian policies.

services.name: ForexConversionService
services.description: Applies current foreign exchange rates for payouts in foreign currencies.

services.name: FemaComplianceService
services.description: Validates payouts against Foreign Exchange Management Act guidelines.

services.name: NreAccountValidationService
services.description: Ensures payouts are directed to valid NRE/NRO bank accounts.

services.name: NriTaxationService
services.description: Applies special DTAA and withholding tax rates for NRI customers.

services.name: MaturityDischargeFormService
services.description: Generates and processes pre-filled maturity discharge vouchers.

services.name: KycVerificationService
services.description: Verifies PAN, Aadhar, and other KYC documents before maturity settlement.

services.name: DocumentArchivalService
services.description: Archives processed maturity claim documents to the enterprise repository.

services.name: WorkflowEscalationService
services.description: Escalates pending maturity cases approaching regulatory turnaround times.

services.name: MakerCheckerValidationService
services.description: Enforces dual-approval workflows for high-value maturity transactions.

services.name: BankMandateService
services.description: Validates NACH and e-mandate records for direct account crediting.

services.name: MaturityReinsuranceRecoveryService
services.description: Calculates the portion of maturity claims to be recovered from reinsurers.

services.name: TreatyCalculationService
services.description: Evaluates proportional and non-proportional treaty terms for maturities.

services.name: ReinsurerNotificationService
services.description: Sends automated bordereaux and claim notifications to reinsurance partners.

services.name: PoolAllocationService
services.description: Allocates maturity liabilities across multiple co-insurers or pools.

services.name: ReinsurerSettlementService
services.description: Reconciles and processes incoming payments from reinsurers for settled claims.
